description_long: This is a modern, rectangular kitchen or utility sink with a single deep basin and an integrated draining board to the left. The sink features a tall, angular faucet mounted at the rear left corner, with a single lever handle for water control. The basin is spacious and boxy, suitable for washing large items, while the draining board provides a flat surface for drying dishes or prepping food. The surface appears to be made of a dark, possibly composite or enameled material, giving it a sleek and contemporary look. The drain is positioned at the rear of the basin, and there is no visible overflow hole. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional layout ideal for urban kitchens or utility spaces.
description: A modern, dark-colored rectangular sink with a deep basin, integrated draining board, and a tall angular faucet. The design is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description_view_0: The sink is seen from the side, showing the deep basin on the right, the flat draining board on the left, and the faucet mounted at the rear left.
description_view_1: A front-facing view highlights the depth of the basin and the faucet's position at the back left corner.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the basin on the left, draining board on the right, and the faucet's angular spout extending over the basin.
description_view_3: A rear view shows the full width of the sink, the faucet, and the drain location at the rear of the basin.
